creator: steve@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

As one of the author's of this program, Aaron Smith <aaron@veritas.com>, 
pointed out 'mesg n' only turns off group write privileges for the user's 
terminal.  A user will still be able to write a message to himself.  This 
behavior is different from FreeBSD's write(1).
